ParamConstructor.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

ID.summary: Gets or sets the ID value.

DataSiteID.summary: Gets or sets the database ID.

DataTableID.summary: Gets or sets the DataTableID value.

DataTableSiteID.summary: Gets or sets the DataTable database ID.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the Name value.

KeyType.summary: Gets or sets the KeyType value.

SourceColumnName.summary: Gets or sets the source column name.

TargetTableName.summary: Gets or sets the target table name.

TargetColumnName.summary: Gets or sets the target column name.

IsClustered.summary: Gets or sets the IsClustered flag.

IsAscending.summary: Gets or sets the IsAscending flag.

DataTableName.summary: Gets or sets the Join TableName value.

ChangedNames.summary: Gets a reference to the ChangedNames list.
